timeline.text: Transplanted into Autopot XL; hand-watering begins
Labeled Plant D; no purple expression at this stage
Deep purple stems, petioles, cotyledons — strongest signal; elevated to primary keeper
~2 nodes, stem/petioles clearly purple, cotyledon anthocyanin; strongest signal overall
2–3 nodes, clear stem/cotyledon pigmentation; keeper candidate confirmed
One of two strongest plants; continued purple expression; vigorous
Photos taken; strong health, continued tracking
Strongest-looking plant today; vigorous multi-node growth; no health concerns
**Topped above node 4**; both primaries now in recovery; LST target ~Apr 17–19
Recovery Day 6; healthy multi-branch canopy; **LST due now**; v1.2 sensor → v2.0 swap
healthy multi-branch canopy; **LST overdue** (Day 7 post-topping); moisture stable ~26%
⚠️ lighter green than peers — monitoring; **LST critically overdue** (Day 8 post-topping); moisture stable ~42%

note.text: Day 37, eight days post-topping: multi-branch canopy; noticeably lighter green than peers today — monitoring for 2–3 more observations; stable moisture (~42%); LST critically overdue. See [2026-04-20](../daily/2026-04-20.md).
